title: EQ - Two devices on one phone, change EQ on one device has no effect on the second device
scenario: EQ preset changes on one Poly device do not affect EQ settings on a second connected Poly device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android phone.
Connect the first Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) to the phone.
Navigate to Home → [First Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select a custom EQ preset (e.g., 'Bass Boost') on the first device.
Connect the second Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320) to the same phone.
Navigate to Home → [Second Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Observe the EQ preset currently selected on the second device.
Change the EQ preset on the first device to a different preset (e.g., 'Treble Boost').
Return to the second device's Equalizer screen and observe if the EQ preset has changed.
expected: Each device maintains independent EQ settings. Changing the EQ preset on the first device does not affect the EQ preset on the second device.
